narrative: Customer in Iran destination. Onward shipment to Russia via Hong Kong transshipment. Entity list hit on consignee. ITAR controlled technical data being sent. Foreign national (h1b) granted access to controlled ECCN 5A002 encryption module. Customer requests EAR99 self-certification without review. OFAC SDN match on the freight forwarder. Surveillance technology destined for the ministry of interior. Dual-use technology to military end user. Cash payment requested, no end-user certification provided. Customer declines to identify end-use.
